g.text: PCIe bus — connects NIC to CPU + RAM

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DMA work between the NIC and system RAM?')
sendPrompt('What is a TX descriptor ring and how does the driver fill it?')
sendPrompt('What is an RX descriptor ring and how does NAPI drain it?')
sendPrompt('What offloads does a NIC do — TSO, GSO, checksum, RSS?')
sendPrompt('What does the MAC controller inside the NIC do?')
sendPrompt('How does MSI-X allow per-queue interrupts on a NIC?')
sendPrompt('What does the PHY layer in a NIC do — encoding, signaling?')
